jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Porter
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
